description_long: This is a modern countertop microwave oven with a rectangular, boxy form and a smooth metallic finish. The front features a large, glossy black door with a vertical handle on the right and a digital green LED display in the upper right corner, likely showing the time. The top and sides are matte gray with subtle venting details, while the back panel is lighter gray with a prominent recessed area and multiple ventilation grilles. The door handle is integrated vertically along the right edge of the door, and the control panel appears to be located on the top surface, with several rectangular buttons. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens or break rooms.
description: A sleek, metallic microwave oven with a large black front door, vertical handle, and digital display, featuring venting on the sides and back.
description_view_0: Left side view showing a triangular vent detail and horizontal slits near the bottom.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the large black door, vertical handle, and green digital display in the upper right.
description_view_2: Right side view with a matching triangular vent and horizontal slits, mirroring the left side.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing a recessed panel with multiple ventilation grilles and a lighter gray finish.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel consists of several rectangular buttons arranged in a row on the top surface of the microwave, with a digital green LED display located on the upper right of the front face. No visible labels or dials are present.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical bar integrated along the right edge of the door, extending nearly the full height of the door. It appears to be made of plastic or metal and is designed for easy gripping and pulling.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are present as horizontal slits near the bottom of both side panels and as a grid of small holes and slits on the rear panel. The side vents are rectangular, while the rear vents are a mix of rectangular and circular patterns.
attribute_window_presence: A large, glossy, semi-transparent black window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface.
